account_sid.description: Twilio Account SID. Used as the HTTP Basic auth username and to scope every account-relative resource path; never logged.

auth_token.description: Twilio Auth Token. Used only as the HTTP Basic auth password; never logged.

base_url.description: Twilio REST API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
